headline: Global Procurement Awards 2026 Shortlist Announced
summary: London, 22 July 2026 – Procurement Magazine and BizClik Media have unveiled the official shortlist for the Global Procurement Awards 2026, recognising the leading individuals and organisations transforming the procurement industry. The awards ceremony will take place on 8 September 2026 at the JW Marriott Grosvenor House London, co-located with The Global Supply Chain Awards and The Global Sustainability Awards during an exclusive black-tie gala dinner. headline: Bank of America Says the Fed Should Raise Rates Now: 4 Dividend Inflation-Resistant Stocks
summary: Bank of America is breaking with the Fed's wait-and-see approach and pushing for rate hikes now, which reshuffles the entire investing playbook. Four dividend-paying stocks across the sectors that quietly thrive when borrowing costs climb deserve a closer look.

headline: Will Keytruda Remain the Driving Force Behind Merck's Q2 Performance?
summary: Keytruda is expected to drive another strong quarter for MRK, with investors watching Q2 sales and management's outlook ahead of the drug's 2028 patent expiry.

raw.headline: Will Keytruda Remain the Driving Force Behind Merck's Q2 Performance?
raw.summary: Keytruda is expected to drive another strong quarter for MRK, with investors watching Q2 sales and management's outlook ahead of the drug's 2028 patent expiry.

headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Delivers 427,000 RSF Bristol Myers Squibb R And D Hub
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) has delivered a 427,000 RSF research and development facility for Bristol Myers Squibb at its San Diego megacampus. The new state-of-the-art R&D hub marks an operational milestone for the company and reflects demand from a large multinational pharmaceutical tenant. Alexandria Real Estate Equities focuses on life science and R&D campuses that serve large pharmaceutical and biotech companies. The new San Diego facility for Bristol Myers Squibb adds...
